input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule D.12.12.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: d.12.12.1
            TITLE: cones (doo)

            CONTENT:
            rule D.12.12.1: Cones (DOO)
D.12.12.1 Cones (DOO) 
Two second penalty for each DOO (including cones after the finish line) on that run

final_answer:
D.12.12.1 Cones (DOO)
Two second penalty for each DOO (including cones after the finish line) on that run
